CustomField.description: The scheduled transport date for delivering this equipment to the site. When populated, the trip engine creates or consolidates a Delivery Trip (Direction__c = "Delivery") grouping all line items sharing the same departure agency and date. This is a transport date, not a billing date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the date when this equipment must be delivered to the site. A delivery trip will be automatically created or updated. Leave blank if no delivery transport is needed for this line item.
CustomField.label: Delivery Date
